title: FY2025 user access review sampling methodology
content: For FY2025 engagements, the standard user access review sample size is 40 when the audit plan does not document an approved alternative.

title: AI use in financial reporting discovery
content: Auditors must determine whether AI-enabled systems or tools are used in financial reporting, transaction processing, control execution, audit evidence preparation, or management decision-making.
proposed_questions: Provide an inventory of AI-enabled systems, models, or tools used in financial reporting, transaction processing, control execution, audit evidence preparation, or management decision-making. For each item, include its purpose, owner, implementation date, hosting arrangement, vendor, and affected financial process.

title: New ERP implementation planning considerations
content: For a newly implemented ERP, obtain implementation governance, data migration reconciliation, cutover approval, post-implementation review, and the current system architecture.
proposed_questions: For each newly implemented ERP, provide implementation governance, data migration reconciliation, cutover approval, post-implementation review, and the current system architecture.
